mapper.select: SELECT t.*, d.department_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN department d ON t.department_id = d.department_id WHERE t.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT t.*, d.department_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN department d ON t.department_id = d.department_id WHERE t.teacher_no = #{teacherNo}
SELECT t.*, d.department_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN department d ON t.department_id = d.department_id ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT t.*, d.department_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN department d ON t.department_id = d.department_id WHERE t.department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher (teacher_no, password, real_name, gender, department_id, email, phone, status) VALUES (#{teacherNo}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{departmentId}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher SET teacher_no = #{teacherNo}, real_name = #{realName}, gender = #{gender}, department_id = #{departmentId}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status} WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}
UPDATE teacher SET last_login_time = NOW() WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}
